videos.title: More Evoke Elementals, Bitterblossom and Mutavault Callbacks | Daily MTG Lorywn Eclipsed Spoilers
videos.description:
Today from Magic Con Atlanta Wizards announced the 2026 Magic: the Gathering sets and gave us some super early Lorwyn Eclipsed spoilers! Here's everything you need to know!

Need Magic cards? https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: Are Mind Twist and Living Death in Standard Now? | Much Abrew
videos.description:
It turns out being able to copy creatures from your graveyard is actually pretty absurd...if you build around it!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish
